text:
(In reply to Justin Hibbits from comment #2)

The last of the PowerMac powerpc64's that I had access
to died back in 2021-Jan. I've not had powerpc64* access
since then. (Nor any powerpc use.)

So: I do not have a context to check on this with. I've
no clue what use of cmpb would end up doing on PPC970's
these days.
